# Excalidraw fixture

`scribble.excalidraw` — hand-authored to the documented schema
(docs.excalidraw.com JSON schema + MIT source field names), CC0.
Contents: a pressure freedraw (5 pts, explicit pressures), a
simulate-pressure freedraw at 60% opacity, a *deleted* freedraw (must be
skipped), a green rectangle (implicit-geometry shape), and a text element.

Field facts are [inferred] until re-verified by loading this file and a
writer output at excalidraw.com (see docs/validated-writes.md checklist).
